creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
It would be great if PR status was displayed after the Summary or as a separate column.

Useful categories:
* Unmaintained
* Unanswered, timeout not expired
* Unanswered, timeout expired
* Answered N days ago
* etc

I run this search for all unassigned port PRs:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/buglist.cgi?bug_status=__open__&bug_status=New&bug_status=Open&bug_status=In%20Progress&email2=ports-bugs%40FreeBSD.org&emailassigned_to2=1&emailtype2=substring&limit=0&list_id=242033&order=bug_id%20DESC&query_format=advanced

It is hard to tell which items are actionable, have to click on each of them.
